boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release the invoice while the ERP hold remains visible?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Policy requires closeout ledger to match including completed payment release approval before release is allowed despite visible hold.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLOSE-RAV-072 payment release approval remains open; STD-RAV-072-P requires full match including this item.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: CLOSE-RAV-072 explicitly states payment release approval remains open, so exact match fails.

final_answer: ESCALATE required. CLOSE-RAV-072 shows payment release approval open despite completed tax review and quality signoff. STD-RAV-072-P demands full match on all listed items before overriding visible HOLD-RAV-072. Source boundary stays open; release cannot proceed on current records.
open_blockers: payment release approval remains open per CLOSE-RAV-072
